questions.question: On what musical instrument did Jack Benny supposedly play poorly, but was in fact very proficient?
What San Francisco neighborhood was considered the birthplace of the 60's counterculture movement?
Name the pop star known for "Travelin' Man," "Poor Little Fool," and "Garden Party."
What famous couple wed and divorced in 1954, but maintained a friendship until her death? He had roses put on her grave weekly until his own death 37 years later.
